name: Wassail Bowl
recipeIngredient: 1 package White wine, dry (750 ml bottle)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 5-quart saucepan over high heat, bring apple cider, cinnamon sticks, allspice, and cloves to a boil.
2. Reduce heat to low; cover and simmer for 15 minutes.
3. Meanwhile, place orange and lemon slices in a heat-safe 5-quart punch bowl.
4. To the cider mixture, add frozen orange juice concentrate, frozen lemonade concentrate, white wine, water, and brown sugar.
5. Bring the mixture to a boil over high heat.
6. Pour the hot mixture over the fruit in the bowl.
